verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's Your song, Lord You created the gift that we bring It's Your song, Lord You created music so we could sing

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's a really good night to be praising Your name This place is so full of Your light And I thank You for sisters and brothers like these And the song that we're singing tonight

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: 'Cause it's Your song, Lord You created the gift that we bring It's Your song, Lord You created music so we could sing So we'll send the melody right back around And make a perfect circle with the sound We love to lift our voices, Lord 'Cause every time we do We're singing Your song for You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When we come together It's always the same The love in our hearts is so strong And we're longing to tell You and praise You again So thank You for sending the song

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: 'Cause it's Your song, Lord You created the gift the we bring It's Your song, Lord You created music so we could sing So we'll send the melody right back around And make a perfect circle with the sound We love to lift our voices, Lord 'Cause every time we do We're singing Your song for You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: In the tune of the raindrops And the sound of the wind All music begins in your heart When we lift a song We're just sending it home Back to where it starts

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: 'Cause it's Your song, Lord You created the gift that we bring It's Your song, Lord You created music so we could sing So we'll send the melody right back around And make a perfect circle with the sound We love to lift our voices, Lord And sing a song for You

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: We love to lift our voices, Lord 'Cause every time we do We're singing Your song Singing Your song Singing Your song for You

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Singing Your song Singing Your song Singing Your song for You

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Singing Your song Singing Your song Singing Your song for You
